events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from Saint Francis Memorial for client 1033. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: diabetic. Allergies: dairy. Sodium ceiling 800 mg/meal, carbs 45–60 g/meal. Prefers Mexican; dislikes nothing noted. Cooking ability: full. 7 meals/week, zone Tenderloin.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Calabacitas con Pollo
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 43 g outside 45–60 g range.

events.title: Matched: Turkey Picadillo with Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 440/800 mg ✓, carbs 48 g (target 45–60) ✓, no dairy ✓.

events.title: Matched: Chicken Fajita Bowl
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 450/800 mg ✓, carbs 57 g (target 45–60) ✓, no dairy ✓.

events.title: Matched: Chicken Tinga with Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 454/800 mg ✓, carbs 48 g (target 45–60) ✓, no dairy ✓.

events.title: Route assigned
events.detail: Client 1033 added to route R-TEND-1 (Tenderloin), delivery 2026-07-21, window 10:00–12:00. Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1033: 7 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 0. 0 hard-constraint violations.
